summary: Platform Scalability & Global Readiness (MEGA PROMPT #26) - Complete testing of all 12 scalability endpoints under /api/scalability/* and the Platform Monitoring frontend page. All 25 backend tests PASS (100%). Frontend page renders correctly with all 4 tabs and proper UI components.

issues: Platform Izleme link exists in adminNav.js under SİSTEM YÖNETİMİ section but sidebar requires scrolling/expanding to see all admin menu items - this is expected behavior for collapsible admin menus

critical_code_review_comments: All 12 scalability endpoints properly require authentication (401/403 for unauthenticated requests)
GET /api/scalability/cache-stats returns hit/miss counters and hit_rate_pct
GET /api/scalability/scheduler-status returns 5 jobs (booking_status_sync, supplier_reconciliation, supplier_health_check, analytics_aggregation, revenue_reconciliation) with running=true
POST /api/scalability/scheduler/trigger successfully triggers jobs manually and returns timestamp
GET /api/scalability/monitoring-dashboard returns combined data: cache, scheduler, redis, last_24h stats
GET /api/scalability/search-metrics returns search cache metrics by product type
GET /api/scalability/tax-regions returns 9 tax regions (TR, AE, GB, DE, FR, IT, ES, GR, US) with VAT and tourism rates
POST /api/scalability/tax-breakdown calculates tax breakdown for TR: base_price=10000, returns vat_amount, tourism_tax, gross_price
GET /api/scalability/currency-rates returns exchange rates and supported_currencies list
Job scheduler implemented with APScheduler, 5 background jobs with different intervals (15min, 30min, 1h, 24h)
Tax engine supports 9 countries with VAT and tourism tax rates

success_rate.frontend: 100% (All UI components render and interact correctly)

seed_data_creation: None - tests use existing scheduler jobs and tax region config
context_for_next_testing_agent: Platform Scalability (MEGA PROMPT #26) fully tested. Key features verified: 1) All 12 /api/scalability/* endpoints working with proper authentication, 2) Platform Monitoring page (/app/admin/platform-monitoring) renders with 4 tabs: Genel Bakis (Overview), Cache, Supplier Metrikleri, Zamanlanmis Gorevler (Scheduler), 3) Overview tab shows 6 metric cards (Arama 24s, Rezervasyon 24s, Komisyon 24s, Uyumsuzluk, Cache Hit, Redis status) and 2 info panels (Zamanlanmis Gorevler list, Altyapi Durumu), 4) Scheduler tab shows 5 jobs with Calistir (trigger) buttons that work correctly, 5) Redis health check returns healthy status, 6) Tax engine supports 9 countries (TR, AE, GB, DE, FR, IT, ES, GR, US), 7) Multi-currency supports TRY/EUR/USD/GBP, 8) Navigation item 'Platform Izleme' is in adminNav.js under SİSTEM YÖNETİMİ section.
